tasks.title: Retrieve reusable implementation patterns across managed projects without leaking project context
tasks.reason: The platform stores project memory and global decisions, but it still lacks a clear mechanism to reuse successful patterns across projects while preserving project-local boundaries.

provider_selection.reason: Cross-project retrieval should be designed carefully in the existing memory and prompt pipeline before wider rollout.

task_intent.objective: Allow planner and coder to reuse proven patterns from other managed projects while keeping project-specific secrets and irrelevant context isolated.
task_intent.context_hint: Building and maintaining other projects effectively requires transfer learning between repos, but the current memory retrieval is still mostly local and heuristic.
constraints: Respect project-local boundaries and safety rules
Prefer compact reusable pattern summaries over raw log dumps
success_signals: Similar successful work from other projects can be retrieved for new tasks
Project-local sensitive context does not leak into unrelated tasks
Cross-project reuse becomes an explicit part of planner/coder context
